title: Backblaze Generative Media Hackathon: Build with Genblaze on B2

submission_deadline_utc.note: Official rules state August 3, 2026 at 5:00 PM EDT.

mode.note: Official event metadata identifies online attendance.

value: No disclosed sponsor, administrator, judge, employer, household, or agent conflict
eligibility.note: Human owner confirmed age, current Beijing residence, and no listed role or relationship conflict on 2026-07-13. Final platform and prize checks remain subject to the terms accepted by the human owner.

allowed_preexisting_work.note: Existing projects may add B2 and Genblaze during the event with significant-update disclosure.

required_technology.note: Both technologies are required and must be used meaningfully.

deliverables.note: Official overview lists the required submission artifacts.

ip_and_license_summary.value: Entrants retain IP and grant judging and promotional rights under the official rules.
ip_and_license_summary.note: Human review remains required before accepting terms.

next_action: Authorize the existing Backblaze account boundary, create bucket-scoped credentials outside the repository, and separately approve at most one Runway gen4.5 attempt capped at USD 0.60.
